$note: Single source of truth for slash-command copy (substrate S3). Guards the two desktop copies against drift — overlay.js (the live command table) and pages/shortcuts.js (the reference list on blanc://shortcuts/), which are hand-synced today (overlay.js even carries a comment saying so) — and generates mobile string resources. The Help → Slash Commands list in main.js (SLASH_COMMANDS) is a third copy in the doc-override spelling, guarded the same way. `hint` is the primary user-facing description (what overlay.js shows and what mobile would use). `doc` overrides the pages/shortcuts.js and main.js listings where they deliberately differ (e.g. /group: the palette shows an input helper, the reference page shows a description).

commands.hint: Save this page to favorites — name a folder to file it

doc.hint: Save this page to favorites, into a folder if you name one

commands.hint: Open a private tab (history stays untouched)
Type a space, then a group name — e.g. "work"

doc.hint: Move this tab into a group, creating it on first use

commands.hint: Take this tab out of its group
Close every tab in this group
